2604.05149.title: EvolveRouter: Co-Evolving Routing and Prompt for Multi-Agent Question Answering
2604.05149.paper_summary: Large language model agents often exhibit complementary strengths, making routing a promising approach for multi-agent question answering. However, existing routing methods remain limited in two important ways: they typically optimize over a fixed pool of agents without improving the agents themselves, and they often rely on rigid collaboration schemes that cannot adapt the number of participating agents to the query. We propose EvolveRouter, a trainable framework that addresses both limitations by jointly improving agent quality and collaboration structure. First, EvolveRouter couples graph-based query routing with targeted instruction refinement in a closed-loop co-evolution process, allowing router diagnostics to guide agent improvement while refined agents provide cleaner supervision for routing. Second, it introduces an adaptive inference strategy that dynamically determines the effective collaboration size for each query through router-weighted answer agreement. Together, these designs enable more capable and more efficient multi-agent reasoning. Experiments on five question answering benchmarks show that EvolveRouter consistently outperforms SOTA routing baselines in both F1 and exact match, while further analysis confirms the benefits of closed-loop refinement and adaptive collaboration.
2604.05149.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型代理通常展現互補的優勢，使得路由成為多代理問答的一個有前景的方法。<lb/>然而，現有的路由方法在兩個重要方面仍然有限：它們通常在固定的代理池中進行優化，而不改善代理本身，並且它們往往依賴於僵化的協作方案，無法根據查詢調整參與代理的數量。<lb/>我們提出了EvolveRouter，一個可訓練的框架，通過共同改善代理質量和協作結構來解決這兩個限制。<lb/>首先，EvolveRouter將基於圖的查詢路由與目標指令細化結合在一起，形成一個閉環共同演化過程，允許路由診斷指導代理改進，同時經過細化的代理為路由提供更乾淨的監督。<lb/>其次，它引入了一種自適應推理策略，通過路由加權的答案一致性動態確定每個查詢的有效協作大小。<lb/>這些設計共同使得多代理推理更加高效和有能力。<lb/>在五個問答基準上的實驗顯示，EvolveRouter在F1和精確匹配上始終超越了SOTA路由基準，而進一步的分析確認了閉環細化和自適應協作的好處。
2604.05149.author: Jiatan Huang et.al.
2604.05149.authors: Jiatan Huang, Zheyuan Zhang, Kaiwen Shi, Yanfang Ye, Chuxu Zhang
